title: How to use Sponge of Virtuoso actually? Could anybody show me a vivid example?
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE test_graph (subject TEXT, predicate TEXT, object TEXT);
INSERT INTO test_graph (subject, predicate, object) VALUES ('http://example.org/item1', 'http://www.wikidata.org/prop/P136', 'http://www.wikidata.org/entity/Q582093');
SELECT subject, predicate, object FROM test_graph WHERE object LIKE 'http://www.wikidata.org/entity/%';

SELECT property, object FROM (SELECT 'http://www.wikidata.org/entity/Q582093' AS entity, property, object FROM jsonb_array_elements((SELECT jsonb_agg(row_to_json(t)) FROM (SELECT * FROM test_graph WHERE subject = 'http://www.wikidata.org/entity/Q582093') t)) AS property) AS subquery LIMIT 100;
key_bug_features: No data retrieved from Wikidata using SPARQL query
